name: Kal'tsit
description:
"Mon3tr."

Medic Operator Kal'tsit from Arknights, one of Rhodes Island's high-level administrative crew, and leader to Rhodes Island's medical projects. Profoundly learned in metallurgy, sociology, Originium Arts, archaeology, history and genealogy, economics, botany, geology, and other fields. In a portion of Rhodes Island operations, provides medical theory assistance and emergency aid apparatus as medical personnel. Simultaneously, active in many projects as a major constituent of Rhodes Island's command system.

hehe, old well- ACK

Kal'tsit is one of the first 6-star Operators I got, which i'm very grateful for. Reading the last few events and the last chapter, Kal'tsit is more understanding and patient with the Doctor than she used to be, and it only makes me like her more.
creator: Anarchy_Shu
